narrative: Pre-induction setup for emergency laparotomy. Patient ID confirmed. Anesthesia machine self-test passed. Pulse oximeter NOT functioning — sensor reading intermittent, replacement on order. Allergy review: penicillin allergy noted but cefazolin still drawn. Difficult airway assessment failed: Mallampati IV, short neck, prior failed intubation — must escalate to the difficult airway algorithm before induction. Estimated blood loss exceeds 2 L given the indication; only one peripheral IV in place. Antibiotic prophylaxis missing — not yet administered. Critical imaging not displayed.
